articles.title: Samxon Expands Production Capacity by 40% to Meet Growing Global Demand
articles.summary: Samxon announces major capacity expansion at its Dongguan manufacturing facility, adding new automated production lines for aluminum electrolytic and solid polymer capacitors to support increasing demand from automotive and industrial markets.
articles.content: Samxon Electronic Co., Ltd. announced a significant expansion of its production capacity at the Dongguan manufacturing facility. The expansion includes the addition of 8 new automated production lines, representing a 40% increase in total manufacturing capacity. The company has invested approximately $25 million in the expansion project. The expansion is driven by strong demand growth across automotive electronics, industrial automation, renewable energy, and 5G infrastructure markets. The new production lines are scheduled to begin operation in phases starting Q2 2024.

articles.title: Samxon Launches New Automotive-Grade Solid Polymer Capacitor Series
articles.summary: New ELF-AU series meets AEC-Q200 standards with 125C operation, ultra-low ESR, and exceptional reliability for next-generation automotive electronics including EV powertrains and ADAS systems.
articles.content: Samxon Electronic Co., Ltd. launched the ELF-AU series, a new line of automotive-grade solid polymer capacitors designed specifically for demanding automotive electronics. The ELF-AU series has successfully passed rigorous AEC-Q200 qualification testing. Key features include ultra-low ESR as low as 5mOhm, high ripple current capability up to 5.5A, wide temperature range from -55C to +125C, and long lifetime rated for 5000 hours at 125C. The series is available in voltages from 16V to 63V and capacitance from 22uF to 680uF.

articles.title: Samxon Achieves ISO 14001:2015 Environmental Management Certification
articles.summary: Samxon's commitment to environmental sustainability recognized with ISO 14001 certification, reinforcing the company's dedication to green manufacturing and responsible resource management.
articles.content: Samxon Electronic Co., Ltd. successfully achieved ISO 14001:2015 certification for its Environmental Management System. The certification covers all capacitor production processes at the Dongguan facility. Environmental initiatives include installation of 2MW solar power system, comprehensive recycling program achieving 85% waste diversion, closed-loop cooling water systems, and VOC emission control systems. All products meet RoHS and REACH compliance requirements.

articles.title: Samxon Introduces Extended-Life Capacitor Series for LED Lighting Applications
articles.summary: New ELL series delivers 50,000-hour lifetime at 105C, specifically engineered for LED driver applications requiring maintenance-free operation for the full life of LED luminaires.
articles.content: Samxon announced the introduction of the ELL (Extended Long Life) series of aluminum electrolytic capacitors, specifically designed to meet the demanding lifetime requirements of LED lighting applications. The ELL series achieves 50,000 hours rated lifetime at 105C through advanced electrolyte formulation, improved sealing design, and high-purity materials. At lower temperatures, lifetime extends dramatically following the Arrhenius relationship. The series covers voltage ratings from 160V to 450V with various capacitance values.

articles.title: Samxon Showcases Latest Capacitor Innovations at PCIM Europe 2024
articles.summary: Samxon demonstrates new high-temperature capacitor series and power electronics solutions at PCIM Europe, the leading international exhibition for power electronics and intelligent motion.
articles.content: Samxon participated in PCIM Europe 2024, the world's leading exhibition for power electronics. The company showcased high-temperature aluminum electrolytic capacitors rated to 150C, solid polymer capacitors for EV applications with AEC-Q200 qualification, high-voltage DC-Link capacitors for solar inverters, and compact SMD aluminum electrolytic capacitors. Samxon also presented a technical paper on advances in capacitor technology for wide bandgap semiconductor applications.

articles.title: Samxon Releases 2023 Sustainability Report Highlighting Environmental Progress
articles.summary: Annual sustainability report details achievements in carbon reduction, waste management, and social responsibility, demonstrating Samxon's commitment to sustainable business practices.
articles.content: Samxon released its 2023 Sustainability Report detailing progress in environmental stewardship, social responsibility, and corporate governance. Key achievements include 25% reduction in carbon emissions per unit of production, 12% improvement in energy efficiency, 18% reduction in water consumption, and 87% waste diversion from landfill. The company also donated $150,000 to local education initiatives and achieved zero serious safety incidents in 2023.
